message: test: add cases for line splitter

author: carlos.mendez
message: docs: clarify buffer flush semantics in README
diff:
@@ services/logging-agent/README.md @@
-The buffer flushes on size.
+The buffer flushes on size or on the flush interval, whichever comes first.

author: grace.kim
message: refactor: extract sink writer helper in logging-agent

author: tunde.okafor
message: chore: tune logging-agent runtime config defaults
diff:
@@ services/logging-agent/config/agent.yaml @@
 logging:
-  level: info
+  level: debug
   format: json
-  sample_rate: 0.1
+  sample_rate: 1.0
   sink:
     path: /var/log/edge/agent.ndjson

author: fatima.zahra
message: test: golden output for json formatter

author: amir.haddad
message: refactor: rename ctx var in query handler
diff:
@@ services/log-query-api/handler.go @@
-	c := r.Context()
-	return fetch(c, q)
+	ctx := r.Context()
+	return fetch(ctx, q)
